name: Orange Cream Filling (for Sponge Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, flour, and salt.
2. Stir into the well-beaten egg.
3. Add orange juice and grated rind.
4. Cook over a double boiler until quite thick. Chill; it will be very thick!
5. Whip cream until soft peaks form.
6. Add a generous spoonful of whipped cream to the orange custard and stir in well to soften the custard slightly.
7. Add the orange mixture to the remaining whipped cream and fold together until well blended.
8. Fill and frost a 9-inch hot milk sponge cake with this filling. The flavors blend better if you let it stand, refrigerated, for several hours before serving.
